mapper.select: /* 공지사항 목록 조회 notice.selectNoticeList */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , TITLE , PIN_YN , VIEW_CNT , FEATURED_YN , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CREATE_DT DESC
/* 공지사항 상세 조회 notice.selectNoticeDetail */ SELECT NOTICE_ID , TITLE , CONTENT , PIN_YN , VIEW_CNT , USE_YN , CRTR_ID , CREATE_DT , MODIFY_DT FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
